content: Gurl...You can literally get at least 2 limited characters of your choice for free during the event + limited WODs. Including the latest limited characters in the game (Arachne can help you to close most of the story chapters btw, EASY). Once you spend all your 250 pulls during this event - please share it here so we can see how terrible BIAV is and how you didn't get anything. How banners are greedy? I genuinely trying to understand your point - you provided with a choice to pull for any character that you want without waiting for their reruns if you want specific character. Like fr name me other gachas who would give you an option to pull the latest limited chracter for free + multiple other characters and limited WODs - even if they are not your favouite but strong nonetheless? Maximium that you can usually get is useless standard characters that nobody even use. But noooo - you want to squeeze maximum from them. And regarding your point of  "disappointing" Light behaviour - I wish he go complete silent as any other gacha developers do. Your whole post is embarassing, seriously
thread_title: Before the Saya no Uta Collaboration Begins

content:
i really dont understand how you're missing the point when so many people seemed to get it, but it doesn't matter how many limiteds i would get. My point was the only problem that i had was how things were handled, i didn't like the banners but that isn't worth complaining about, because they're just not worth spending on, when i was planning to spend. 

the banners being 24 hours is a negative, thats for inducing fomo, its predatory. the banners also have 180hp rather than 90, thats terrible.  Theyre only useful if  you want both the wheel and the character, otherwise you're pulling for potentially wheel dupes.  That's fine with the free pulls, but im not going to spend for it lmao

the only thing embarassing is reviving this point to whine about one of the more level headed  complaints that light got, and i think i worded it well enough for every other person to understand what i meant.

you just want someone to fight with for some reason, and thats fine, but I have nothing to gain from it, I already made my point clearly enough for anyone reading in good faith to understand. I'm just blocking you and moving on lol
